old_value: {"id":"smallhold-41j","title":"HTTP client with signed GETs for remote actor fetching","description":"Implement an HTTP client capable of making signed GET requests for fetching remote actor documents and posts. Uses reqwest with rustls-tls. Outbound GETs must be signed with the fetching actor's keypair (draft-cavage-http-signatures-11) because GoToSocial and others require authorized fetch. Sign: (request-target), host, date.","design":"Use activitypub-federation crate's HTTP signing primitives. keyId = {actor_uri}#main-key. Sign with the fetching persona's private key. Use instance-level signing actor for fetches not associated with a specific persona.","acceptance_criteria":"Can fetch a remote actor document from mastodon.social with proper Accept header; GoToSocial accepts the signed fetch; Date header is UTC RFC 7231 format within 30s of now; Accept: application/activity+json, application/ld+json; profile=...","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:00:05Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:00:05Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-b89","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:00:07Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
